title: hieracium viscidulum
intro: Hieracium viscidulum, also known as sticky hawk's beard, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium viscidulum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium viscidulum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
